section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# Periodic Transaction Report — Cover

- **NAME:** Rohit Khanna
- **OFFICE TELEPHONE:** (202) 225-2631
- **[X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives** — State: CA, District: 17 (File an original and 2 copies)
- **[ ] Officer or Employee** — Employing Office: blank (File an original and 1 copy)
- **IPO question:** Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering? Yes [ ] / No [X]
- **Report type:** Initial Report [X] / Amendment [ ]
- **Date of Report Being Amended:** blank
- Notice: "A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late."
- Stamp: LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER — 17 DEC 12 PM 12:02 — OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — HAND DELIVERED — initials "MC"
- Transaction grid contains only the greyed example row (JT | Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock | Sale X | 02/05/015 | 03/07/15 | B) and the handwritten/typed note: **"Please see the attached"** — no actual transaction rows on this page.
